    IU Java Utilities API Reference

    Modules
    Module
    Description
    iu.util
    Provides basic Java utilities that simplify working with java.base.
    iu.util.client
    Functional programming adapters for the Jakarta JSON Processing and Java HTTP Client modules.
    iu.util.config
    IU configuration utilities module.
    iu.util.crypt
    Low-level web cryptography API module.
    iu.util.crypt.impl
    Low-level web cryptography support.
    iu.util.jdbc.pool
    Database connection pooling utilities.
    iu.util.jwt.api
    JWT API module
    iu.util.pki
    IU PKI utilities API module.
    iu.util.pki.impl
    IU PKI utilities implementation module.
    iu.util.redis
    Redis connection utilities
    iu.util.saml
    IU SAML 2.0 Service Provider API module
    iu.util.session
    IU session management API module
    iu.util.session.impl
    IU Session Management implementation module
    iu.util.test
    Provides unit testing support.
    iu.util.type
    Type introspection utilities.
    iu.util.type.base
    Type introspection base utilities.
    iu.util.type.bundle
    IU Type Introspection Utilities bundled implementation module.
    iu.util.type.impl
    Type introspection utilities implementation module.
    iu.util.type.loader
    Type introspection loader module.
